title: JWT Validator Online — Verify JWT Signatures Free
seoTitle: JWT Validator Online | Verify JWT Signature Free
description: Validate JWT token signatures online with HS256, JWKS, and RS256. Free client-side JWT validator — no upload, instant verification.
keywords: jwt validator,jwt signature verification,verify jwt token online,validate jwt signature

faq.q: How do I verify a JWT signature online?
faq.a: Paste your token and secret (HS256) or JWKS URL (RS256) into our JWT Validator. Signature verification runs entirely in your browser.

faq.q: Can I validate RS256 tokens without uploading keys?
faq.a: Yes. Use the JWKS Validator with your provider's public key endpoint. Keys are fetched client-side only.

faq.q: What happens if signature validation fails?
faq.a: The token was modified, signed with a different key, or uses the wrong algorithm. See our invalid signature guide for debugging steps.

faq.q: Is decoding the same as validating?
faq.a: No. Decoding reads header and payload without proving authenticity. Always verify the signature before trusting claims.

faq.q: Are production tokens safe to paste here?
faq.a: All processing is local. Never paste production secrets into any online tool. Use test tokens when possible.

title: JWT Decoder Online — Decode JWT Token Instantly
seoTitle: JWT Decoder Online | Decode JWT Token Free
description: Decode JWT tokens online instantly. View header, payload, and claims. 100% browser-based — no server upload.
keywords: jwt decoder,decode jwt token,jwt decode online,jwt parser,jwt payload viewer

faq.q: How do I decode a JWT token?
faq.a: Paste the token into our JWT Decoder. It splits the three Base64URL segments and displays header and payload as JSON.

faq.q: Can I decode JWT without the secret?
faq.a: Yes. Header and payload are Base64URL-encoded, not encrypted. Signature verification requires the key.

faq.q: What are the three parts of a JWT?
faq.a: Header (algorithm and type), payload (claims), and signature (cryptographic proof). They are separated by dots.

faq.q: Does jwt.io store my token?
faq.a: JWTValidator.org never sends tokens to a server. All decoding happens in your browser.

faq.q: How is this different from jwt.io?
faq.a: We offer 13 free tools, 1,000+ guides, and the same privacy-first client-side processing. See our jwt.io comparison.

title: JWT Debugger Online — Inspect & Debug JWT Tokens
seoTitle: JWT Debugger Online | Debug JWT Claims Free
description: Debug JWT tokens with claim analysis, expiration timeline, and validation warnings. Free OAuth and API development tool.
keywords: jwt debugger,jwt debug tool,jwt inspector,debug jwt token online

faq.q: What does a JWT debugger show?
faq.a: Decoded claims, expiration status, issuer and audience checks, algorithm warnings, and a timeline of time-based claims.

faq.q: When should I use the debugger vs decoder?
faq.a: Use the decoder for quick inspection. Use the debugger when troubleshooting OAuth flows, expired tokens, or claim mismatches.

faq.q: Does the debugger verify signatures?
faq.a: It analyzes structure and claims. Use the JWT Validator or JWKS Validator for full signature verification.

faq.q: Can I debug Auth0 or Cognito tokens?
faq.a: Yes. Paste any standard JWT. Pair with our provider guides for iss, aud, and JWKS validation.

faq.q: Is this tool free for teams?
faq.a: Yes. No account, no API limits. Share URLs encode tokens in the query string for quick collaboration.

title: JWT Signature Verification — How to Verify JWT Tokens
seoTitle: JWT Signature Verification | Verify JWT Online
description: Learn and perform JWT signature verification with HS256, RS256, ES256, and JWKS. Step-by-step guide plus free online tools.
keywords: jwt signature verification,verify jwt signature,validate jwt token,jwt verify online

faq.q: What is JWT signature verification?
faq.a: Recomputing the HMAC or verifying the asymmetric signature to prove the token was issued by a trusted party and was not tampered with.

faq.q: Which algorithm should I use?
faq.a: RS256 or ES256 for public APIs and OAuth. HS256 only when you control both issuer and verifier and can protect the shared secret.

faq.q: What is JWKS used for?
faq.a: JSON Web Key Sets publish public keys so verifiers can fetch the correct key by kid without hardcoding certificates.

faq.q: Why does verification fail with correct secret?
faq.a: Common causes: wrong algorithm, token truncation, clock skew on exp, or using the public key where a secret is expected.

faq.q: Must I verify on every API request?
faq.a: Yes. Never trust decoded payload without signature verification and claim validation (exp, iss, aud).
